question.label: Rewrite role
question.name: What role would make sense for you in the billing rewrite?
question.description: Clarifies how they might best fit into the upcoming rewrite without assuming enthusiasm or resistance.

answer: Honestly — the billing rewrite. I've heard whispers but nobody's talked to me about it directly. That's a bit weird.

assessment.note: They said nobody had talked to them directly about the billing rewrite, signaling a clarity gap and mild growth interest in being included.

new_queue.label: Rewrite risk
new_queue.name: Where do you expect the billing rewrite to get difficult?

new_queue.label: Stretch edge
new_queue.name: What part of your work right now feels most like a stretch?

history.answer_excerpt: Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
Cleanup and docs for payments, reviewing PRs for the new team members. Not much stretching me right now.
I'd like to do more mentoring. I brought it up maybe three months ago and nothing came of it. I'm not pushing.
Honestly — the billing rewrite. I've heard whispers but nobody's talked to me about it directly. That's a bit weird.
